title: Single-Use Seals
description: A single-use seal binds an offchain state transition to a UTXO that can be spent only once. Spending the outpoint closes the old seal and prevents the same state transition from being valid twice.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Applications
resources.notes: Explains how Bitcoin outpoints provide single-use seals for client-side validated systems.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background on UTXOs and application-layer protocols.
